a little something
💌

Someone made this
just for you, Mast Billo 💗

A few taps, a few surprises… ready?

Hold the heart...
Tap to light up these 18 stars, representing 18 beautiful chapters of your life. (0/18)
Just as you lit up these stars, you've lit up my entire world cutie.

18 Times You Melted My Heart

Tap the envelopes to open them...

TAP TO OPEN THE ENVELOPE...
💗
Tap to collect
✦ scratch to reveal ✦
01

Messy shirts, beautiful memories.

The absolute best part of my school days was sharing these smiles with my Cutie. ✨

✦ scratch to reveal ✦
02

That saree on you! 💚

A perfect mirror selfie with my gorgeous Rasmalai.

✦ scratch to reveal ✦
03

Under the magical lights

but honestly, your sweet smile was still the brightest thing there. 💫

✦ scratch to reveal ✦
04

Farewell diaries! 🖤

Look at us... though I was definitely just lucky to be standing next to the prettiest girl in the room.

✦ scratch to reveal ✦
05

Those chubby cheeks! 🥰

I promise to always annoy you, pull your cheeks, and make you smile exactly like this.

FORGET THE ORIGINALS

Nothing sounds as beautiful as you.

♥

Tap the heart for your next gift ✨

I have a lot
of names for you...

Find your name pair of two and unlock your next gift.

just for you

Flowers fade, but this one is coded to last forever.

Everything about you

tap each one 💗

🌸
Your Heart
tap
So pure, completely mine. ✨
💭
Your Mind
tap
Always your safe place. 🤍
💔
Our Fights
tap
Always ends in love. 🫂
💕
Just You
tap
You are my world. 💖

Tap to Open,
I Have Something
For Your Eyes to Read...

♡
♡
✦

July 21st

A very Happy Belated 18th Birthday meri Cutie! 💗😻

Sabse pehle to I am so so so sorry yaarrr... Mujhe pata h jab tumne mujhse wo "bohot bada paragraph" likhne ko bola tha, to maine bohot rude way me mana kr diya tha ki "mujhse nhi hota". Aur uske baad mere us suspense ki wajah se tumko bohot ghabrahat bhi hone lagi thi... I know tumko bohot bura laga hoga aur tum upset thi.

Please apne is gadhe ko maaf krdo Shikha! 🫶🏻 I swear mera intention tumko hurt krna ya overthink karwana bilkul nhi tha...

Sach batau to mai wo paragraph isliye nhi likhna chahta tha kyuki mai bohot time se tumhare liye ye puri website design kr rha tha. Mera PC ka data pura wipe out ho gaya tha (you know that), to sab kuch wapas se build krne me time lag gaya. Mujhe ye surprise exact 17th ki midnight par dena tha, par aaj 21st ho gayi... is delay ke liye I am extremely sorry! ❤️

Mai tumhe sirf ek normal text bhej kr wish nhi krna chahta tha. Mujhe tumhe ek aisa surprise dena tha jo humesha ke liye special ban jaye... bilkul tumhari tarah jitni tum special ho! 😘🫶🏻

〰️

Aur ek aur baat...

Kal maine jo tumhe khud se door karne wali stupid baatein boldi thi na... uske liye I am really really sorry.. mera dimaag us time bilkul thik kaam nhi kr rha tha, aur maine us bewaklofi se tumko hurt kr diya.

Please us baat ko dil pe mat lena aur bhul jaana..

Sach to ye h ki mai tumko ek pal ke liye bhi khud se door krne ka soch hi nhi skta.

Us waqt tumne jis tarah daant kar mujhe "shut up" bola aur samjhana chaha... us cheez ne mujhe realize karwaya ki tum mujhse kitna pyaar krti ho aur mai kitna lucky hu... ❤️

Tumko shayad andaza bhi nhi h ki tum mere liye kitni special ho! 💗

Meri nazaron me you are absolutely perfect... mujhe aaj tak tumme koi flaw nhi dikha! 😻

❤

Tum literally sabse pyaari aur cutest insaan ho jisse mai aaj tak mila hu.

Par ek baat bolu?

Mujhe pata h tum bohot zyada overthink krti ho (jaise us raat overthink krke darr gayi thi).

Please... mere liye ye overthinking krna thoda kam kr do... I mean band hi kr do!

Aur haan, baat baat per rona to aaj se bilkul hi band!

Agar mai tumhare liye thoda sa bhi matter krta hu na... to please rona mat... ❤️

Tumhara wo soft heart bohot precious h, aur tumhari aankhon me aansu bilkul acche nhi lagte!

Tumhara wo choti choti baaton pe sensitive ho jana cute lgta h, par mujhe tumhe khush dekhna h... humesha! 🥰😘

Koi bhi tumhari jagah kabhi nhi le sakta... aur koi tumhe replace nhi kr skta! ❤️

Tumne mujhe jis tarah se special feel krwaya h wo mai kabhi bhul nhi sakta.

Wo first time jab tumne mera haath pakda tha... us ek moment ne mujhe itna special feel krwaya tha ki mai usko words mein describe hi nhi kr sakta! 😻🫶🏻

Par mujhe pata h ki tum exactly samajh rhi ho mai kya kehna chahta hu...

Tum sach mein meri Rasmalai, meri Sweetheart, meri Jaan, aur meri sabse badi Cutie ho... 😘💗🥰

Aaj tum officially 18 ki ho gayi ho... a grown up now! 🎉

Ye milestone bohot bada h, aur mai wish krta hu ki tumhari life ka ye naya chapter bohot saari khushiyan, success aur pyaar lekar aaye... mera wala ofc 👀❤️

Bhagwan kare tumhe duniya ki har wo chiz mile jo tumhara dil chahta h!

Mai chahta hu ki life ke is naye phase mein tum aur bhi zyada strong bano, aur apni us beautiful smile ko kabhi fade mat hone dena! 🥰

Zindagi chahe kitni bhi aage badh jaye, mujhe tumhara pura saath chahiye.

Mai chahta hu ki tum meri is journey mein humesha mere saath raho, aur mai bhi promise krta hu ki chahe kuch bhi ho jaye, mai humesha tumhare saath khada rahunga! 🫶🏻❤️

You are irreplaceable! 😻

Once again...

Sorry for being a little late, un sab bewakoofiyon ke liye, aur us raat waise behave krne ke liye.

I just wanted this to be absolutely perfect for you! 😘

I love you so much baby! ❤️
Happy 18th Birthday once again! 🥳❤️

♡
18
🐰

Ek last promise...

No matter what happens, chahe main tumhare sath rahun ya na rahun, you will never let anything dull your beautiful smile Shikha, I love that.

And aaj se chhoti chhoti baaton par rona band, aur ye overthinking karna bhi bilkul band...

Promise me? ❤️

Yes, that's
my girl!

❤️
♡

Now keep that
promise forever.

♥

Love you so much...

♥

And sorry again... ✨
